what_it_does: Renders an inline status pill that displays a small Vi mark icon next to text, with a 'live' visual mode driven by a boolean prop.
observations: Component accepts children and an optional live boolean defaulting to false.
Applies conditional CSS classes vi-status-pill and live when live is true.
Embeds a ViMark component at size 18, animated only when live, with showGlyph={false}.
Exposes the component on window.ViStatusPill at the end of the file.
standards: Compact presentational component pattern with prop-driven styling.
Global window assignment for runtime access.
conventions: Functional React component with default prop value.
CSS class concatenation via template literal.
Naming prefix 'Vi' for brand/agent-specific UI kit components.
notes: A small branded status indicator that couples a text label with an animated Vi glyph when marked as live.
questions: Where is ViMark defined or imported?
Is window.ViStatusPill assignment intentional for external scripts, or legacy global registration?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose of showing Vi's current activity matches the implementation: it renders a pill with a Vi mark and optional live state.
intention_signals: Provide a reusable, recognizable status badge for the Vi agent/assistant that can signal an active/live state through animation and styling.
contribution: A compact, prop-driven status pill component that combines a branded animated mark with arbitrary child text, useful for indicating agent state in a design system UI kit.
summary_for_embedding: ViStatusPill is a React functional component that renders an inline status pill containing an animated Vi mark and child text, with a live boolean prop toggling animation and styling classes.
intention_for_embedding: This file was intended to provide a reusable branded status indicator for showing Vi's current activity or live state inside the ConceptV design system.

symbols.does: Renders an inline pill with a Vi mark icon and text, optionally styled and animated for a live state.
symbols.description: ViStatusPill is a functional React component that receives children and a live prop (default false). It returns a span with conditional 'live' styling, containing a ViMark icon configured at size 18, animated only when live, and without its glyph, followed by the provided text children. The component is also assigned to window.ViStatusPill.
